data.name: ACCO Brands Corporation
data.description: ACCO Brands Corporation designs, manufactures, and markets consumer, school, technology, and office products in the United States, Canada, Brazil, Mexico, Chile, Europe, the Middle East, Australia, New Zealand, and Asia. It operates in two segments, ACCO Brands Americas and ACCO Brands International. The company offers note taking products, gaming and computer accessories, planners, workspace mach...

data.name: Acadia Healthcare Company, Inc.
data.description: Acadia Healthcare Company, Inc. provides behavioral healthcare services in the United States and Puerto Rico. data.name: ACNB Corporation
data.description: ACNB Corporation, a financial holding company, offers banking, insurance, and financial services to individual, business, and government customers in the United States. The company offers checking, savings, and money market deposit accounts, as well as time deposits and debit cards. It also provides commercial lending products, such as commercial mortgages, real estate development and construction...
